session_history.purpose: Record of completed tasks and decisions

structure.entry:
## [Task Name] - [Timestamp]
- **Status**: ✅ Completed
- **What Was Done**: [description]
- **Decisions Made**: [list]
- **Outcomes**: [results]
- **Related Files**: [file links]

context_cache.purpose: Quick context recovery for current work

structure.entry:
## [Task ID] - [Task Name]
- **Status**: [not-started|in-progress|completed]
- **Priority**: [high|medium|low]
- **Due**: [date or 'ongoing']
- **Progress**: [percentage]
- **Next Steps**: [list]
- **Blockers**: [if any]
- **Owner**: Claude Code

## [Discovery Title]
- **Category**: [performance|pattern|bug-fix|optimization]
- **Problem**: [what was the issue]
- **Solution**: [what worked]
- **Code Example**: [if applicable]
- **Applicability**: [when to use]
- **Date Discovered**: [timestamp]

initialization_sequence: Check if .claude/memory/ exists, create if not
Read context-cache.md and restore last state
Read task-status.md and display pending tasks
